executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
IMPORTANT: The app is deployed at https://aadesh-ai.in (NOT localhost). Use https://aadesh-ai.in as the base URL for all tests.

Test login credentials:
- Email: banu.test@aadesh-ai.in
- Password: Banu@Aadesh2026

The app is a bilingual Kannada/English government SaaS application. Most UI text is in Kannada script. The login page is at /auth/login. After login, user is redirected to /app (dashboard).

For the generate order test, use these test inputs:
- Order type: appeal
- Case number: TEST-001
- Survey number: 45/2
- Village: ಬೆಂಗಳೂರು
- Appellant: ರಾಮಯ್ಯ
- Case details: ಈ ಪ್ರಕರಣದಲ್ಲಿ ಅಪೀಲುದಾರರು ತಮ್ಮ ಭೂಮಿಯ ಮಾಲೀಕತ್ವದ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮನವಿ ಸಲ್ಲಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
